name: Mexican Chicken Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 4 oz can chopped green chiles, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces.
2. In a Dutch oven, brown the chicken, onion, and garlic in butter until the chicken is no longer pink.
3. Dissolve the bouillon in hot water.
4. Add the dissolved bouillon mixture to the pan along with cumin; bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Add half and half, cheese, corn, chilies, and hot pepper sauce.
7. Cook and stir over low heat until the cheese is melted.
8. Stir in the chopped tomato.
9. Serve immediately. Garnish with cilantro if desired.
